overview.short: Prachitgad is a fort in the Sahyadri mountain range in Sangli district of Maharashtra state, India.
overview.description: Prachitgad is a fort in the Sahyadri mountain range in Sangli district of Maharashtra state, India. It covers an area of 5 acres (20,000 m2).

topPlaces.name: Chandoli National Park
topPlaces.description: Chandoli National Park is a national park established in Sangli district in May 2004. Earlier it was a Wildlife Sanctuary declared in 1985.

items.note: Chandoli National Park is a national park established in Sangli district in May 2004. Earlier it was a Wildlife Sanctuary declared in 1985.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Prachitgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Prachitgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (89 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (146 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Prachitgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Prachitgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Prachitgad?
faq.a: Stays in Prachitgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Prachitgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chandoli National Park.
